title: Blueno Falls
description: Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Blueno, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: They're the ones who challenged us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys are lagging behind again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Uooo!! You cut through that thick stone!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Got it! I'm counting on you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Only a few of you will do!!

summary: Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.
